_note: Hand-maintained INPUT for the /config-map skill. Holds only what build_data.py cannot derive from install.ps1, the skill/hook dirs, and the per-repo git sweep: the agent columns, the capability-matrix row structure (link-backed cells are derived; non-derivable cells carry an `annot`), the universal-skill scope set, the project-wired (non-globally-wired) hooks, and the conventions panel + principles prose. Everything else in config.data.js is GENERATED. Edit this, then run `py .claude/skills/config-map/build_data.py`.

conventions.ds: Working method, conventions, git/PR pipeline, fleet doctrine & gotchas — one file symlinked into every agent home.
Canonical visual identity + the floating bottom-tab nav contract for every web app.
Universal → global-CLAUDE.md · shape-specific → project-scaffolding · instance → the repo's own CLAUDE.md. Enforced weekly by /context-audit.
The canonical scaffold every sister repo derives its CLAUDE.md from — conventions flow up, never diverge.

principles: edit in fleet-config, live in every agent home via junctions
the map introspects install.ps1 + the dirs — it can't go stale
config-map is the weekly photo · /context-audit flags the drift
hooks, statusline & design bottom out at each agent's surface
